# thundercompute_pricing (Data Source)

Retrieves current hourly pricing for Thunder Compute GPU types.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "thundercompute_pricing" "current" {}

output "hourly_prices" {
  value = data.thundercompute_pricing.current.pricing
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `pricing` (Map of Number) Map of GPU type/mode identifier to hourly price in USD.
